title: Mount Komochi
summary:
Mount Komochi (子持山, Komochi-yama) is a volcano in Gunma Prefecture, Japan. Its elevation is 1,296 metres (4,252 ft) and its prominence is 597 metres (1,959 ft).


== References ==
